---
title: Dashboard with Svelte
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/ActionBar.svelte
format: dashboard
---

# Page 1

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
myActionBar = html`<my-actionbar2></my-actionbar2>`
```

## Row 

### Main Content
This row will now take up all the *remaining* space because the row above is set to "flow" (auto-height).
